data.title: Platinum Luxury Auctions Notches Another Record in March Sale of FL Waterfront Estate
data.description:
Platinum Luxury Auctions Notches Another Record in March Sale of FL Waterfront Estate

Platinum Luxury Auctions Notches Another Record in March Sale of FL Waterfront Estate

PR Newswire

JACKSONVILLE, Fla., April 2, 2025

JACKSONVILLE, Fla., April 2, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Miami-based luxury real estate auction house Platinum Luxury Auctions has announced another record sale for a home in coastal Florida. In March, the firm sold the sprawling property at 2180 Eventide Avenue in Saint Johns, Florida, a community within Saint Johns County, immediately south of Jacksonville. The sale occurred via a live auction held on the property site on March 8th, wherein a total of nine bidders gathered to bid for the home, which was offered without reserve.

the price "nearly doubled" the market's previous record of $4.85 million

Platinum could not disclose the sales price, but noted it was "a significant record for the community of Saint Johns, achieving a new, all-time high price for the market," according to Trayor Lesnock, Platinum's founder and president. Lesnock served as auctioneer for the sale and said the price "nearly doubled" the market's previous record of $4.85 million. Platinum held the sale in partnership with listing broker of record Anita Vining of Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices Florida Network Realty.

The property had been listed by Vining during portions of 2021 at 2022 at a price of $9.9 million before being taken off the market. It was then scheduled for luxury auction in early 2025 and simultaneously re-listed at $15 million, a price that was largely chosen for promotional purposes in advance of the auction, according to Platinum.

Lesnock noted the high bidder was all smiles after prevailing at the auction, but first approached the process carefully. "The buyer was initially somewhat trigger shy after the frustration of coming up short at another auction in the area but ultimately registered for the sale, prevailed and is thrilled to soon be the new owner of the property," he said. The identity of the buyer was not disclosed, other than being described by Platinum as an entrepreneur with businesses in publishing, entertainment and real estate.

Platinum has been recently active in Saint Johns County, selling four properties in a row there – largely in Ponte Vedra Beach – within the past 18 months. In fact, the firm has another, upcoming sale on May 17 for a 3-story oceanfront home in southern Ponte Vedra Beach. Lesnock expects the broader market area, including neighboring Duval County, to be more active for high-end home auctions over the next few years. "Pricing remains resilient, which is positive, though many brokers are reporting that their previous 'over-supply' of luxury buyers has significantly contracted in the traditional brokerage market. In these instances, sellers tend to explore their options, such as the luxury auction process."

The Eventide property spans an impressive 15 waterfront acres and features a main residence and two-story guesthouse, both styled in the manner of the grand mansions of the Old South. The parcel includes more than 100 mature oak trees and boasts 600 ft of frontage on the St. Johns River, in addition to an 1,100-ft boat dock.

Additional details on the sale are available by contacting Platinum's offices at 800.262.5132 or by visiting PlatinumLuxuryAuctions.com.

About Platinum Luxury Auctions: Platinum Luxury Auctions created the luxury auction® model for multimillion-dollar real estate auctions and owns the federal trademark rights to the term "luxury auction." The Miami-based auction house specializes in the non-distressed sale of multimillion-dollar properties in the U.S. and select international markets, and has offered properties in 33 states and 14 countries to date. Platinum's team has closed more than $1.7 billion in luxury auction sales, and has consulted or advised HNW and UHNW individuals on more than $4.45 billion in luxury property assets. PlatinumLuxuryAuctions.com.

View original content to download multimedia:https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/platinum-luxury-auctions-notches-another-record-in-march-sale-of-fl-waterfront-estate-302418863.html

SOURCE Platinum Luxury Auctions LLC

data.title: Tesla Shares Rebound Following Report of Musk's Potential Exit From Trump's Inner Circle
data.description:
By Dean Seal 




  Shares of Tesla rebounded from an earlier decline following a Politico report that Chief Executive Elon Musk would soon step back from his role in the Trump administration, according to people familiar with the matter. 



  The stock was up 5.5%, at $283.20, in midday Wednesday trading. It is still down about 30% since the start of the year. 



  Shares fell as much as 6.4%, to a low of $251.27, in the morning session after Tesla reported a 13% drop in vehicle deliveries during the first quarter. Wedbush analysts said the result was disastrous and reflected growing negativity around the brand stemming from Musk's involvement in President Trump's inner circle. 



  "This continues to be a moment of truth for Musk to navigate this brand tornado crisis moment and get onto the other side of this dark chapter for Tesla with much better days ahead," the analysts said. 



  Later Wednesday, Politico reported that Musk was expected to soon leave Trump's inner circle, citing the people familiar. Trump has said as much to administration allies, including members of his Cabinet, the people said, according to the report. 



  Musk has been seen as a political liability by Trump allies, and his impending retreat comes a day after he spent millions of dollars to support the candidacy of a conservative judge who lost on Tuesday night in the race for a Wisconsin Supreme Court seat, the report said. 



  The report prompted a speedy turnaround in Tesla's often volatile stock. Shares have climbed as high as $478.86 and fallen as low as $142.05 in the past 12 months. 





  Write to Dean Seal at dean.seal@wsj.com 





  (END) Dow Jones Newswires



  April 02, 2025 13:53 ET (17:53 GMT)


Copyright (c) 2025 Dow Jones & Company, Inc.

data.title: BlackBerry's stock heads for its worst day in weeks after revenue outlook disappoints
data.description:
By James Rogers

Weighed down by the company's weaker-than-expected outlook, BlackBerry's stock is headed for a seventh straight loss

BlackBerry Ltd. shares were down nearly 7% in early-afternoon trading Wednesday, as the cybersecurity company's weaker-than-expected outlook overshadowed better-than-expected fourth-quarter revenue and adjusted earnings.

The stock (BB) was headed for a seventh consecutive daily loss, which would be its longest losing streak since an eight-day stretch that ended Oct. 9, 2023. It was also on track for its biggest one-day selloff since it plunged 7.3% on March 10.

For the first quarter, BlackBerry estimates revenue of $107 million to $115 million, below the FactSet analyst consensus estimate of $125.1 million. For the full year, the company expects revenue of $504 million to $534 million, compared with the FactSet consensus estimate of $535.4 million.

Revenue from QNX, which is BlackBerry's recently rebranded Internet of Things segment, is expected to be between $51 million and $55 million in the first quarter, below the FactSet consensus estimate of $58.1 million. Revenue from its secure-communications division is expected to be between $50 million and $54 million, compared with the FactSet consensus estimate of $62 million. Licensing revenue is expected to be approximately $6 million, above the FactSet consensus estimate of $3.3 million.

For the three months ending Feb. 28, BlackBerry's adjusted fourth-quarter profit of 3 cents a share beat the FactSet consensus estimate of 0 cents.

Related: BlackBerry posts smaller loss than expected as it marches toward profitability

Revenue was $141.7 million, down from $152.9 million in the prior year's quarter. Analysts surveyed by FactSet were looking for revenue of $129.7 million.

"BlackBerry closed out this transformational fiscal year with another quarter of strong financial performance from all three divisions: QNX, Secure Communications and Licensing," Chief Executive John Giamatteo said in a statement. "We also took a big step forward by completing the sale of the Cylance business to Arctic Wolf" in February, which Giamatteo called "a win-win for all parties."

The company's total cash and investments increased by $144 million from the prior quarter, to $410 million. BlackBerry attributed this in part to improved operating cash flow and to approximately $80 million received from the first tranche of cash from the Cylance sale.

Related: BlackBerry swings to surprise profit on sales growth for IoT, cybersecurity businesses

Revenue from QNX was $65.8 million, compared with $65.9 million in the prior year's quarter, and above the FactSet consensus estimate of $61.7 million. Secure-communications revenue was $67.3 million, down from $71.6 million in the same period last year, but above the FactSet consensus of $62.5 million. Licensing revenue was $8.6 million, down from $15.4 million in the prior year's quarter, but above the FactSet consensus of $3.5 million.

BlackBerry shares are up nearly 24% in the last 12 months, outpacing the S&P 500 index's SPX gain of more than 9%.

-James Rogers

This content was created by MarketWatch, which is operated by Dow Jones & Co. MarketWatch is published independently from Dow Jones Newswires and The Wall Street Journal. 




  (END) Dow Jones Newswires



  04-02-25 1336ET


Copyright (c) 2025 Dow Jones & Company, Inc.

Can Mitolyn Work for Older Adults & Slow Metabolism? Consumer Reports Weigh In

As people age, losing weight becomes increasingly difficult, not because of a lack of effort but because metabolism naturally slows down. Many individuals over 40 experience stubborn fat that won’t budge, even when following a strict diet or workout regimen. The reason? Consumer reports show that older adults who take Mitolyn have seen significant improvements in weight loss, energy levels, and metabolic function. Unlike generic fat burners that rely on stimulants, Mitolyn directly targets mitochondrial health, which is especially crucial for those over 40. One of the key advantages of Mitolyn for older adults is that it supports metabolic function without overstimulating the body. Traditional weight loss supplements often contain harsh stimulants, which can cause heart palpitations, sleep disturbances, and blood pressure spikes—issues that many people over 40 prefer to avoid. Age-related metabolic slowdown doesn’t have to mean inevitable weight gain. Consumer reports consistently suggest that Mitolyn offers a legitimate solution for age-related metabolic decline, allowing users to experience sustainable fat-burning and improved vitality.

Mitolyn Success Stories – Consumer Reports Reveal Who Is Seeing Real Results

With thousands of people trying Mitolyn for weight loss, the results speak for themselves. Unlike traditional diet pills that offer short-term effects, users report that Mitolyn provides long-term, sustainable fat loss, increased energy, and overall metabolic improvements. Mitochondria play a crucial role in muscle endurance and post-exercise recovery, meaning that stronger mitochondrial function leads to more efficient fat oxidation during and after workouts. Many users who take Mitolyn alongside their fitness routine notice improved stamina, increased fat-burning, and better overall physical performance.

>> Exclusive Discount Available! Get Mitolyn for a Huge Price Drop – Up to $300 Off!

Individuals who struggled with hormonal weight gain—such as women in menopause or those with metabolic disorders—have also reported significant improvements while using Mitolyn. Many of them found that conventional diets failed to produce lasting results, but Mitolyn’s focus on mitochondrial efficiency helped regulate their metabolism without causing extreme fluctuations in energy or hunger levels.

Another major trend in consumer reports is that users who had previously hit weight loss plateaus finally started shedding fat again after incorporating Mitolyn into their daily routine. This suggests that Mitolyn helps the body overcome metabolic resistance, which is a common issue among individuals who have tried multiple weight loss programs with little success.

Mitolyn success stories highlight one key factor: it works across a broad spectrum of users, regardless of age, lifestyle, or fitness level. By addressing the root cause of slow metabolism—inefficient mitochondria—Mitolyn provides a sustainable approach to weight loss that goes beyond temporary fixes.

>>See real transformations and discover how Mitolyn is helping users achieve lasting weight loss results.

The Science Behind Mitolyn: Experts Reveal Why It Works for Weight Loss

Weight loss supplements often make big promises, but few have scientific backing that explains how they actually work at a biological level. Mitolyn is different because its formulation is rooted in mitochondrial science, a field that has been gaining significant attention in medical and nutritional research.

At its core, Mitolyn helps the body optimize fat-burning at the cellular level by improving mitochondrial function. Mitochondria are responsible for converting calories into usable energy, but when they become damaged, inefficient, or decrease in number, the body burns fewer calories and stores more fat instead. Studies on mitochondrial health show that supporting mitochondrial biogenesis—the process of creating new mitochondria—can dramatically enhance metabolism and energy expenditure.

Each of Mitolyn’s key ingredients has been researched for its ability to enhance mitochondrial function. For example:

  • Maqui Berry is rich in anthocyanins, which have been shown to protect mitochondria from oxidative stress and improve their ability to generate energy efficiently.
  • Rhodiola Rosea, a well-studied adaptogen, has been linked to enhanced fat oxidation and stress reduction, which helps prevent cortisol-driven weight gain.
  • Haematococcus Pluvialis, an algae extract containing astaxanthin, has been shown to increase mitochondrial activity and promote cellular repair, leading to better endurance and sustained energy production.

Unlike stimulants that simply increase calorie burning temporarily, Mitolyn enhances the body's natural ability to regulate energy and fat metabolism over the long term. Research into mitochondrial health consistently indicates that people with stronger, more active mitochondria are better at maintaining a healthy weight, have higher energy levels, and experience fewer metabolic disorders.

Clinical studies also support the concept that mitochondrial efficiency plays a key role in fat loss. A Harvard study on metabolic health found that people with higher mitochondrial activity burn calories more efficiently, even at rest. Another research paper published in the Journal of Obesity and Metabolic Health stated that targeting mitochondrial function is one of the most effective strategies for long-term weight management.

Mitolyn’s formula aligns perfectly with these findings, making it a scientifically backed solution rather than a temporary weight loss gimmick. It’s not just about cutting calories or suppressing appetite—it’s about fixing metabolism at its core by fueling the body's energy-producing cells.

>>Want to understand the science behind Mitolyn? Discover how its ingredients enhance fat-burning and metabolic function.

Do Doctors Recommend Mitolyn? What Medical Professionals Say About Its Ingredients

When considering a supplement like Mitolyn, many people want to know if it has backing from health professionals. While the supplement industry is filled with products that lack scientific validation, Mitolyn’s approach to weight loss is supported by decades of research on mitochondrial function and metabolic health.

Medical professionals, including nutritionists, metabolic specialists, and functional medicine doctors, recognize that mitochondrial dysfunction is a leading cause of slow metabolism, poor energy levels, and persistent weight gain. Because Mitolyn is formulated with ingredients specifically selected to optimize mitochondrial health, experts acknowledge its potential to support sustainable fat loss without the use of synthetic stimulants or harmful chemicals.

One of the most praised aspects of Mitolyn’s formulation is its focus on antioxidant-rich superfoods and adaptogens. Rhodiola Rosea, Maqui Berry, and Haematococcus Pluvialis are ingredients that have been extensively studied for their role in reducing oxidative stress, supporting cellular energy production, and improving metabolic function. Several studies have shown that when mitochondria are healthy and active, fat-burning occurs more efficiently, even at rest.

Unlike traditional diet pills that rely on short-term appetite suppression or thermogenic stimulants, Mitolyn takes a completely different approach. By enhancing how the body naturally processes energy, it allows users to burn fat more effectively without disrupting normal biological functions. This approach is why medical professionals who focus on long-term metabolic health see Mitolyn as a safer alternative to conventional fat burners.

Doctors specializing in metabolism and weight management have pointed out that supporting mitochondrial efficiency should be a foundational strategy for improving body composition. Since Mitolyn provides clinically backed ingredients that promote mitochondrial biogenesis, it aligns with modern nutritional science rather than outdated weight loss gimmicks.

>>Discover why health professionals recognize Mitolyn as a smarter way to support metabolism and fat loss.

Mitolyn for Energy & Mental Clarity – Why Users Are Raving About Unexpected Benefits

While most people try Mitolyn for weight loss, many users report unexpected benefits beyond fat-burning. One of the most commonly mentioned side effects in consumer reports is a dramatic increase in daily energy and mental clarity.

This shouldn’t be surprising. Mitochondria don’t just fuel metabolism; they also power brain function, cognitive processing, and overall vitality. When mitochondria aren’t operating at full capacity, the body experiences brain fog, sluggishness, and persistent fatigue—issues that many people don’t even realize are linked to poor mitochondrial health.

Consumers who take Mitolyn supplement daily report that they feel more alert, focused, and mentally sharp within just a few weeks. Some even say they’ve stopped relying on caffeine as much because their natural energy levels have improved significantly. Unlike the temporary stimulation from coffee or energy drinks, Mitolyn enhances the body’s ability to generate real, sustained energy from within.

The brain requires an immense amount of energy to function properly, and since mitochondria fuel that process, any improvement in mitochondrial efficiency can lead to noticeable cognitive benefits. This is why users often describe experiencing better concentration, improved mood stability, and even enhanced memory retention after incorporating Mitolyn into their routines.

The unexpected mental benefits of Mitolyn further prove that its effects extend beyond just weight loss. Consumers searching for Mitolyn reviews on Reddit and other platforms frequently discuss how they feel more awake, less sluggish, and more productive throughout the day.

For those who have felt drained, foggy-headed, or constantly tired despite sleeping well, this could indicate mitochondrial dysfunction. Restoring mitochondrial efficiency not only helps burn fat but also improves how the brain and body generate energy.

Should You Try Mitolyn? Who It’s Best For (And Who Won’t Benefit)

Mitolyn is designed for anyone who struggles with a slow metabolism, stubborn weight gain, and low energy levels, but that doesn’t mean it’s for everyone. Understanding who will benefit most from Mitolyn can help set the right expectations and ensure the best possible results.

Those who are most likely to see success with Mitolyn include individuals who:

  • Have experienced weight gain due to metabolic slowdown or age-related mitochondrial decline.
  • Have tried multiple diets but always hit a plateau, indicating underlying cellular inefficiencies.
  • Struggle with low energy, brain fog, or fatigue that isn’t explained by lifestyle factors.
  • I want a science-backed weight loss solution that doesn’t rely on artificial stimulants.
  • Prefer a long-term metabolic fix rather than a quick but temporary fat-burning solution.

However, Mitolyn may not be the right choice for:

  • Those expecting overnight weight loss—Mitolyn is not a crash diet pill and doesn’t work by suppressing appetite or dehydrating the body.
  • Individuals who are not willing to take it consistently—skipping doses will slow down mitochondrial improvement and delay fat loss results.
  • People who expect stimulant-like effects—Mitolyn doesn’t cause jittery energy spikes or aggressive thermogenic fat burning, making it a healthier but more gradual solution.

One of the most common mistakes users make is assuming that any supplement will work without consistency. Mitolyn is effective, but only when taken daily as directed. Those who follow the recommended usage see noticeable metabolic improvements, while those who take it sporadically may not experience the full benefits.

Ultimately, Mitolyn is best suited for people who want a sustainable, natural way to improve metabolism and long-term fat loss. If you’re looking for a quick-fix stimulant or a diet pill that forces weight loss unnaturally, Mitolyn won’t meet those expectations. However, if you want real metabolic change from within, Mitolyn is designed to support that process.

data.title: Sonic Launches TSA-Approved Intermediate Aviation Toolset with Rugged Mobile Case
data.description:
Sonic Launches TSA-Approved Intermediate Aviation Toolset with Rugged Mobile Case

Sonic Launches TSA-Approved Intermediate Aviation Toolset with Rugged Mobile Case

PR Newswire

AUBURN, Ala., April 2, 2025

Access All 263 Tools at Once Within a Portable, Ruggedized Hard-Shell Case Purpose Built for Fly-Away Technicians

AUBURN, Ala., April 2, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Sonic, a leading provider of professional-grade tool solutions and equipment, today announced its 263-piece Intermediate Aviation Toolset with Mobile Case, a mobile toolset comprising 263 individual pieces including sockets, wrenches, pliers, punchers, and much more, all backed by Sonic's hassle-free lifetime warranty. The tools are conveniently organized into one TSA-approved, hard-shell case with multiple handles and wheels–all weighing less than 100 pounds for the aviation technician on the go.

A step up from the basic aviation toolset, the intermediate set is designed for aviation technicians who are or are working towards becoming airframe and powerplant (A&P) technicians. The intermediate toolset is the perfect solution for hassle-free travel yet robust enough to tackle most aviation repair and service jobs.

"The Aviation Toolset and Mobile Case balance the competing portability needs but with quick access to a thorough set of hand tools to get the job done. Its meticulous design ensures technicians can quickly and easily access any tool they need via its innovative drawer system that can display every tool at once," said Colby McConnell, Co-founder and CEO, Sonic USA. "It's a big deal to be able to carry such a large quantity of tools, 263 to be exact, in such a small, smartly designed footprint. And there's still room for additional tools. We're excited to offer such a comprehensive yet portable option for technicians who must frequently travel. It's a must for Fly Away Techs."

The mobile case comprises a durable, injection-molded body made of copolymer polypropylene. The rugged exterior is designed to withstand rough usage and harsh weather conditions. Aiding its portability, the case features two side handles, a telescoping handle, and four sturdy, silent, self-oiling wheels. Modeled after Sonic's storage and cabinetry, the case contains an anti-tilting mechanism to stop tools from accidentally falling out when the drawers are open.

Inside, the custom Sonic Foam System (SFS)provides an edge for conducting mobile service. When the toolset is in motion, technicians don't need to worry about tools becoming jumbled and falling out of place. The two-toned chemical-resistant foam interior also maximizes storage space while keeping tools organized during the job. The SFS, via independent time studies, has proven to accelerate toolbox inventory checks while reducing the number of misplaced tools, all the while improving retrieval, return, and, most importantly, service and repair times compared to traditional storage methods.

On the outside, a metal reinforced padlock hole enables technicians to completely secure all compartments with one single lock, as desired. To further aid organization and prevent cross-contamination with other toosets, serialized tool ID laser etching comes standard on each tool. Custom etching is available at an additional cost. 

For more information about Sonic and to inquire about preordering the Intermediate Aviation Toolset with Mobile Case, visit www.SonicToolsUSA.com.

About Sonic
Sonic takes pride in being the industry experts in high-quality hand tools, toolboxes, and premium storage solutions in the segments they service, automotive, aviation and manufacturing. Sonic is a trusted partner for professionals who demand the best. The company offers a wide range of innovative and durable hand tools designed for demanding tasks, ensuring precision and efficiency in every project. Sonic is committed to continuous improvement and exceeding customer expectations through superior quality and unbeatable customer experience.

View original content to download multimedia:https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/sonic-launches-tsa-approved-intermediate-aviation-toolset-with-rugged-mobile-case-302418837.html

SOURCE Sonic Tools

data.title: The Redesign Group Awarded 2025 North America Emerging Partner of the Year by Rapid7
data.description:
The Redesign Group Awarded 2025 North America Emerging Partner of the Year by Rapid7

The Redesign Group (“Redesign”), a global technology & cybersecurity firm, today announced it has been named 2025 North America Emerging Partner of the Year by Rapid7, a leader in extended risk and threat detection. This award recognizes Redesign’s exceptional growth in the past year—a result of consistent collaboration to deliver market-leading security solutions and support.

In today’s rapidly evolving threat landscape, companies are turning to trusted advisors who can help them navigate regulatory requirements, expanding attack surfaces, and complex hybrid cloud environments. Redesign’s partnership with Rapid7 provides streamlined access to cutting-edge cybersecurity tools, paired with expert implementation and advisory services.

“We are thrilled to partner with Rapid7 to help our customers manage risk, improve security posture, and scale their security operations capabilities,” said Patrick Sullivan, CEO of Redesign Trust, the cybersecurity business unit at Redesign. “Rapid7 provides one of the most comprehensive security operations platforms in the market today, offering our customers real-time visibility, threat intelligence, and automation across their environments.”

By leveraging The Rapid7 Command Platform, including InsightVM for vulnerability management, InsightIDR for Next-Gen SIEM, Threat Command for threat intelligence, and Managed Threat Complete for 24x7 security monitoring and response, Redesign Trust helps its customers reduce detection and response times, meet compliance goals, and stay ahead of emerging threats.

“Rapid7's partner ecosystem plays a vital role in helping organizations simplify security, take control of their attack surface, and confidently navigate a dynamic threat landscape,” said Chris Koch, Director, North American Channel at Rapid7. “Our partnership with The Redesign Group allows us to deliver excellent customer service and value alongside a highly adaptive, predictive, and responsive cybersecurity platform.”

Redesign is part of the Rapid7 PACT Program, which was recently updated to unite partners with tailored engagement programs and specializations, an all-new Partner Training Academy, and a modernized and expanded partner portal. Through its participation in the program, Redesign can offer powerful, industry-leading solutions to joint customers so they can take command of their attack surface.

For more information about Redesign’s security offerings, visit: https://www.redesign-group.com/trust

About The Redesign Group

Redesign Group is a global technology solutions provider and consulting firm. We leverage design thinking, interdependent subject matter expertise, and emerging technology solutions to help organizations achieve meaningful transformation. Our cybersecurity business unit, Redesign Trust, delivers modern risk management, compliance automation, and managed security services to organizations around the world. For more information, visit our website or follow us on LinkedIn.

The Redesign Group Company Contact:
Jen Sanginario
Director, Marketing
Jen.sanginario@redesign-group.com

data.title: Grifols in 'Very Preliminary Talks' With Brookfield Over Renewed Takeover Bid — 2nd Update
data.description:
By Cristina Gallardo 




  The Grifols family has held "very preliminary talks" through several investment firms over a potential takeover bid, according to a source close to the pharmaceutical company's reference shareholders. 



  Three investment firms linked to the Grifols family--Deria, Ponder Trade and Radellor--and a fourth called Scranton Enterprises confirmed Wednesday that the talks were initiated by Brookfield and were "very preliminary," the same person said, adding that it was too early to conclude the acquisition would go ahead. 



  Earlier Wednesday, a media report indicated that investment company Brookfield had resumed discussions with the Grifols family--which controls the Spanish pharmaceutical company--about a possible deal. 



  But Grifols's board and Brookfield said they weren't in takeover talks. 



  "Brookfield is not, and has not been, in discussions with the company's board of directors with respect to a potential transaction," Brookfield said. 



  The investor said it maintains a general dialogue with Grifols's reference shareholders, but said there is no update since it decided against making a bid for the company in November. 



  Grifols's board said separately that it "has no knowledge" of talks regarding another attempt by Brookfield to acquire the company. 



  The statements came after Spanish news website El Confidencial reported, citing unnamed sources, that Brookfield had resumed talks with the Grifols family over a possible deal. 





  Write to Cristina Gallardo at cristina.gallardo@wsj.com 





  (END) Dow Jones Newswires



  April 02, 2025 13:19 ET (17:19 GMT)


Copyright (c) 2025 Dow Jones & Company, Inc.

data.title: Why Trump's 'liberation day' tariffs might -2-
data.description:
Meanwhile, the U.S. is at full employment, is a net energy exporter and has a dynamic and flexible services-driven economy. Despite the U.S.'s worrisome federal debt dynamics, China's current bout of deleveraging is so extreme that it may take years (if not decades) to fully clean out. China's current situation has similarities to Japan's "Lost Decades," given the two countries' similar population demographics.

In short, the U.S. would outperform the rest of the world in the event of a tariff-induced recession. It's why a "stay home" (versus "go global") bias is warranted, and investors should overweight U.S. stocks in a diversified portfolio.

Melissa Tagg is the senior global investment strategist at Yardeni Research. Ed Yardeni is president of Yardeni Research, a provider of global investment strategy and asset-allocation analyses and recommendations. This article is excerpted from Yardeni Research's "Morning Briefing" for April 2, 2025, "Tariffs Are Messy." Individual investors can read Yardeni Research reports here. Follow Yardeni on LinkedIn and via his LinkedIn blog.

Plus: One of Wall Street's biggest optimists says investors should hang tight because Trump wants the stock market to rally

Also read: Tariffs won't bring back U.S. manufacturing. Here's what they will do to stocks.

-Melissa Tagg -Ed Yardeni

This content was created by MarketWatch, which is operated by Dow Jones & Co. MarketWatch is published independently from Dow Jones Newswires and The Wall Street Journal. 




  (END) Dow Jones Newswires

data.title: Novavax Falls But Then Recovers After WSJ Report on Vaccine's FDA Status
data.description:
By Josh Beckerman 




  Novavax shares declined right after The Wall Street Journal reported that the Food and Drug Administration is unlikely to give full approval soon for a company Covid-19 vaccine, but then the stock recovered. 



  Shares went as low as $5.70. They recently traded at $6.20, up 3.2%. 



  The vaccine is approved for emergency use. The FDA had set an April 1 deadline for a decision on whether to grant a normal, full approval, the WSJ reported. 





  Write to josh.beckerman@wsj.com 





  (END) Dow Jones Newswires



  April 02, 2025 13:06 ET (17:06 GMT)


Copyright (c) 2025 Dow Jones & Company, Inc.

data.title: Supermajority's Taylor Salditch on the Wisconsin Supreme Court Election: "Women spoke loud and clear, we won't be bought"
data.description:
Supermajority's Taylor Salditch on the Wisconsin Supreme Court Election: "Women spoke loud and clear, we won't be bought"

Supermajority's Taylor Salditch on the Wisconsin Supreme Court Election: "Women spoke loud and clear, we won't be bought"

PR Newswire

MADISON, Wis., April 2, 2025

MADISON, Wis., April 2, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Taylor Salditch, executive director of Supermajority, a nonprofit organization focused on building women's political power, issued the following statement on Wednesday after Susan Crawford won election to the Wisconsin Supreme Court for a ten-year term:

 This landslide victory is a reminder that, when we organize and when we come together as a community, we win.

"Women in America spoke loud and clear yesterday: We won't be bought. Billionaires like Elon Musk may be able to buy favor and influence in the White House, but they can't buy our freedoms out from under us. A supermajority of women voters showed up in Wisconsin to vote their values, issuing a vocal rejection of right-wing attacks on abortion access and the freedom to vote."

"This race was one of the most contested and most expensive state races in Wisconsin's history. President Trump's close advisor and Tesla CEO Elon Musk along with groups affiliated with the billionaire poured tens of millions of dollars into the race, hoping to earn favor with voters and buy their way to a conservative state Supreme Court. The race became a proving ground for the way voters feel about President Trump's early policies."

"Supermajority reached out to thousands of young women in Wisconsin who don't often vote—and what we heard spoke volumes. These young women were ready to stand up and make their voices heard against the Trump administration's extreme policies meant to harm women and our families."

"This landslide victory is a reminder that, when we organize and when we come together as a community, we win. And we'll be heard at every single ballot box between here and the midterms. The path ahead won't always be easy, but we know when we show up for each other to protect our freedoms, a world where women are truly equal is possible."

Supermajority is a women's equality organization made up of women of all backgrounds, races, and ages who are coming together to build a future where we are all truly equal. Supermajority is dedicated to building women's collective political power by providing the information, training, and resources needed to take meaningful action at the local, state, and national levels.

View original content to download multimedia:https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/supermajoritys-taylor-salditch-on-the-wisconsin-supreme-court-election-women-spoke-loud-and-clear-we-wont-be-bought-302418823.html

SOURCE Supermajority
